emails.subject: Swap Contract
emails.body: Swap Contract Sara: Can you please e-mail a sample ISDA without any credit info or address info to Phil Touhy George Woodward at the addresses above? Thanks! Chris

emails.subject: Re: Swap Contract
emails.body: Corprate. Wheelabrator Shasta. We have a Master physical with them. C From: Sara Shackleton on 10/04/2000 02:13 PM CDT

emails.subject: Re: Swap Contract
emails.body: Re: Swap Contract Chris: What TYPE of counterparty are we dealing with here (i.e., corporate, municipal, individual, etc.)? I need to understand this before I send out a form. Sara Chris H Foster 10/04/2000 01:19 PM
